loaded_dice.name: Loaded Dice
loaded_dice.description: Setup/Builder: Throw weighted dice at the foe. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Luck Pip.

ante_up.name: Ante Up
ante_up.description: Setup: Increase the stakes of the gamble. Generates 2 Luck Pips and marks the target.

jackpot.name: Jackpot!
jackpot.description: Payoff: Hit the winning combination. Consumes 5 Luck Pips to deal massive Physical damage. 20% chance to quadruple total damage.

bad_beat.name: Bad Beat
bad_beat.description: Payoff: Force your opponent to lose everything. Consumes 3 Luck Pips to deal damage and apply 3 random debuffs.

lucky_break.name: Lucky Break
lucky_break.description: Defense: A stroke of pure luck. The next incoming hit has a 50% chance to miss completely.

all_in.name: All In
all_in.description: Defense: Sacrifice certainty for safety. Reduces incoming damage by 10-90% (Random every tick) for 6 ticks.

shuffle.name: Shuffle
shuffle.description: Mobility: Re-position yourself into a random room in the zone instantly.

high_stakes.name: High Stakes
high_stakes.description: Utility/Signature: For 15 ticks, all Luck generation is tripled, but all misses deal damage to yourself.

gambler_physiology.name: Gambler Physiology
gambler_physiology.description: Passive: Favor of Fortune. You gain 10% critical chance and every 10th strike deals double damage.
